[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001 2
1 0111001 4
2 0111010 4
3 0001111 4
4 0010010 2
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0101000 2

01 10 0000000 a match 5 6
12 21 1010000 2
23 32 0001000 1
34 43 0001001 2 match 0
45 54 0111000 3
56 65 0001010 2
67 76 0000010 1
70 07 0000000 a match 5 6

02 20 0101000 2 match 7
13 31 0000001 1
24 42 0111000 3
35 53 0001000 1
46 64 0001001 2 match 0
57 75 0010010 2 match 4
60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0010000 1

03 30 0001000 1
14 41 0010001 2
25 52 0111010 4 match 2
36 63 0001001 2 match 0
47 74 0010000 1
50 05 0101000 2 match 7
61 16 0000101 2
72 27 0010010 2 match 4

04 40 0101000 2 match 7
15 51 0010000 1
26 62 0001010 2
37 73 0000000 a match 5 6
